name: Decorated Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: Creamy vanilla frosting, tinted with food color (if desired)
Colored sugar, small candies, candied fruit or nuts (optional)
If using self-rising flour, omit baking soda and cream of tartar.
recipeInstructions:
Mix powdered sugar, margarine, vanilla, almond extract, and egg. Stir in remaining ingredients except granulated sugar. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Heat oven to 375°F. Grease cookie sheet lightly. Divide dough in half. Roll each half into a 1/4-inch thick round on a lightly floured surface. Cut into desired shapes with 2 to 2-1/2 inch cookie cutters. Place on cookie sheet. Bake 7 to 8 minutes or until edges are light brown; cool.
Frost or decorate cooled cookies with Creamy Vanilla Frosting tinted with food color if desired. Decorate with colored sugar, small candies, candied fruit or nuts if desired. About 5 dozen cookies (80 cookies per cookie sheet).
